collision.description: Covers damage to your vehicle from a collision with another vehicle or object.
collision.limit: Actual Cash Value (ACV) of the vehicle at the time of the loss.

comprehensive.description: Covers damage from non-collision events such as theft, vandalism, fire, natural disasters, falling objects, and animal strikes.
comprehensive.limit: Actual Cash Value (ACV) of the vehicle at the time of the loss.

glass_coverage.description: Not included in Basic plan. Windshield and glass damage subject to comprehensive deductible.

exclusions: Damage caused by intentional acts of the insured.
Damage occurring while the vehicle is used for commercial rideshare or delivery services.
Wear and tear, mechanical breakdown, or gradual deterioration.
Damage to custom equipment or aftermarket modifications exceeding $1,000 in value.
Damage occurring while the vehicle is operated by an unlicensed driver.
claim_conditions: Claims must be reported within 30 days of the incident.
Insured must provide photographic evidence of damage.
A police report is required for all collision claims exceeding $2,500 in estimated damage.
Insured must cooperate with the claims investigation and provide access to the vehicle for inspection.
Two repair estimates from licensed body shops are recommended but not required.
basic.depreciation_method: Actual Cash Value with standard depreciation schedule based on vehicle age and mileage.
basic.payment_terms: Claim payments issued within 15 business days of claim approval, minus applicable deductible.

collision.description: Covers damage to your vehicle from a collision with another vehicle or object.
collision.limit: Actual Cash Value (ACV) of the vehicle at the time of the loss.

comprehensive.description: Covers damage from non-collision events such as theft, vandalism, fire, natural disasters, falling objects, and animal strikes.
comprehensive.limit: Actual Cash Value (ACV) of the vehicle at the time of the loss.

rental_reimbursement.description: Covers rental car costs up to $30/day for up to 30 days while your vehicle is being repaired due to a covered claim.

glass_coverage.description: Windshield and glass damage subject to comprehensive deductible.

exclusions: Damage caused by intentional acts of the insured.
Damage occurring while the vehicle is used for commercial rideshare or delivery services.
Wear and tear, mechanical breakdown, or gradual deterioration.
Damage to custom equipment or aftermarket modifications exceeding $2,500 in value.
Damage occurring while the vehicle is operated by an unlicensed driver.
claim_conditions: Claims must be reported within 60 days of the incident.
Insured must provide photographic evidence of damage.
A police report is required for all collision claims exceeding $5,000 in estimated damage.
Insured must cooperate with the claims investigation and provide access to the vehicle for inspection.
standard.depreciation_method: Actual Cash Value with standard depreciation schedule based on vehicle age and mileage.
standard.payment_terms: Claim payments issued within 10 business days of claim approval, minus applicable deductible.

collision.description: Covers damage to your vehicle from a collision with another vehicle or object. Includes diminished value coverage for vehicles less than 5 years old.
collision.limit: Replacement cost for vehicles under 3 years old; Actual Cash Value (ACV) for older vehicles.

comprehensive.description: Covers damage from non-collision events such as theft, vandalism, fire, natural disasters, falling objects, and animal strikes.
comprehensive.limit: Replacement cost for vehicles under 3 years old; Actual Cash Value (ACV) for older vehicles.

rental_reimbursement.description: Covers rental car costs up to $50/day for up to 45 days while your vehicle is being repaired due to a covered claim.

glass_coverage.description: Full glass coverage with $0 deductible for windshield repair or replacement.

exclusions: Damage caused by intentional acts of the insured.
Wear and tear, mechanical breakdown, or gradual deterioration.
Damage to custom equipment or aftermarket modifications exceeding $5,000 in value unless separately scheduled.
claim_conditions: Claims must be reported within 90 days of the incident.
Insured must provide photographic evidence of damage.
Insured must cooperate with the claims investigation and provide access to the vehicle for inspection.
Dedicated claims concierge assigned for premium policyholders.
premium.depreciation_method: Replacement cost for vehicles under 3 years; Agreed Value for classic/specialty vehicles if scheduled.
premium.payment_terms: Expedited claim payments issued within 5 business days of claim approval, minus applicable deductible.

collision.description: Pays for damage to your car when it hits or is hit by another vehicle or object.

comprehensive.description: Covers non-collision damage including theft, fire, weather events, animal collisions, and falling objects.

glass_coverage.description: Glass damage subject to comprehensive deductible.

exclusions: Intentional damage by the policyholder or any household member.
Commercial use of the vehicle including rideshare and delivery.
Mechanical or electrical breakdown not caused by a covered event.
Aftermarket parts and custom modifications.
Racing, stunts, or off-road use not on public roads.
claim_conditions: Claims must be filed within 30 days of the incident date.
Photos of all damage are required at the time of filing.
Police report required for hit-and-run, theft, and vandalism claims.
Vehicle must be available for inspection by a GEICO adjuster or approved appraiser.
basic.depreciation_method: Actual Cash Value based on comparable market vehicles.
basic.payment_terms: Payment within 15 business days of approval, minus deductible.

collision.description: Pays for damage to your car when it hits or is hit by another vehicle or object.

comprehensive.description: Covers non-collision damage including theft, fire, weather events, animal collisions, and falling objects.

rental_reimbursement.description: Up to $40/day for a maximum of 30 days while your vehicle undergoes covered repairs.

glass_coverage.description: Glass damage subject to comprehensive deductible.

exclusions: Intentional damage by the policyholder or any household member.
Commercial use of the vehicle including rideshare and delivery.
Mechanical or electrical breakdown not caused by a covered event.
Racing, stunts, or off-road use not on public roads.
claim_conditions: Claims must be filed within 60 days of the incident date.
Photos of damage are required.
Police report required for hit-and-run, theft, and vandalism claims.
Vehicle must be available for inspection.
standard.depreciation_method: Actual Cash Value based on comparable market vehicles.
standard.payment_terms: Payment within 10 business days of approval, minus deductible.

collision.description: Pays for damage to your car when it hits or is hit by another vehicle or object. Includes new car replacement for vehicles less than 1 year old.
collision.limit: New vehicle replacement for cars under 1 year; ACV for older vehicles.

comprehensive.description: Covers non-collision damage including theft, fire, weather events, animal collisions, and falling objects.
comprehensive.limit: New vehicle replacement for cars under 1 year; ACV for older vehicles.

rental_reimbursement.description: Up to $60/day for a maximum of 45 days while your vehicle undergoes covered repairs.

exclusions: Intentional damage by the policyholder.
Mechanical or electrical breakdown not caused by a covered event.
Racing or competitive driving events.
claim_conditions: Claims must be filed within 90 days of the incident date.
Photos of damage are required.
Police report recommended but not required for claims under $10,000.
Priority claims processing with dedicated adjuster.
premium.depreciation_method: New vehicle replacement (under 1 year, under 15,000 miles); ACV for all others.
premium.payment_terms: Expedited payment within 5 business days of approval, minus deductible.

collision.description: Covers repair or replacement of your vehicle after a collision.

comprehensive.description: Covers non-collision events: theft, vandalism, weather, fire, animal strikes, glass breakage.

glass_coverage.description: Glass claims subject to comprehensive deductible.

exclusions: Intentional acts by any insured person.
Vehicle used primarily for business, rideshare, or delivery purposes.
Normal wear, rust, corrosion, or mechanical failure.
Custom parts and equipment over $1,500.
Damage from off-road or track use.
claim_conditions: File claims within 30 days of the loss.
Provide photographic documentation of all damage.
Police report required for claims involving injury or property damage over $2,000.
Allow Progressive or an approved appraiser to inspect the vehicle.
basic.depreciation_method: ACV based on market comparables and condition assessment.
basic.payment_terms: Claims paid within 14 business days of approval, minus deductible.

collision.description: Covers repair or replacement of your vehicle after a collision. Includes deductible savings bank ($50 credit per 6-month policy period without claims).

comprehensive.description: Covers non-collision events: theft, vandalism, weather, fire, animal strikes, glass breakage.

rental_reimbursement.description: Up to $35/day for up to 30 days during covered repairs.

glass_coverage.description: Glass claims subject to comprehensive deductible.

exclusions: Intentional acts by any insured person.
Vehicle used primarily for business, rideshare, or delivery purposes.
Normal wear, rust, corrosion, or mechanical failure.
Custom parts and equipment over $3,000.
claim_conditions: File claims within 60 days of the loss.
Provide photographic documentation of damage.
Police report required for claims involving injury.
Allow Progressive or an approved appraiser to inspect the vehicle.
standard.depreciation_method: ACV based on market comparables and condition assessment.
standard.payment_terms: Claims paid within 10 business days of approval, minus deductible.

collision.description: Covers repair or replacement of your vehicle after a collision. Includes diminished value protection and accident forgiveness (first at-fault accident does not increase premiums).
collision.limit: Better car replacement: if totaled, covers a vehicle one model year newer with 15,000 fewer miles.

comprehensive.description: Covers non-collision events: theft, vandalism, weather, fire, animal strikes, glass breakage.

rental_reimbursement.description: Up to $50/day for up to 45 days during covered repairs.

glass_coverage.description: $0 deductible for windshield repair or replacement.

exclusions: Intentional acts by any insured person.
Normal wear, rust, corrosion, or mechanical failure.
claim_conditions: File claims within 90 days of the loss.
Provide photographic documentation of damage.
Concierge claims service with dedicated representative.
Vehicle inspection by Progressive network or approved appraiser.
premium.depreciation_method: Better car replacement for total losses; ACV for partial losses.
premium.payment_terms: Priority processing: claims paid within 5 business days of approval, minus deductible.

collision.description: Covers your vehicle for damage resulting from a collision.

comprehensive.description: Covers damage from theft, weather, fire, animals, vandalism, and falling objects.

exclusions: Intentional damage.
Business or commercial vehicle use.
Mechanical and electrical breakdown.
Custom parts over $1,000.
Racing or competitive events.
claim_conditions: Report within 30 days.
Photos of damage required.
Police report for accidents with injuries or over $2,500 in damage.
Vehicle inspection required.
basic.payment_terms: Payment within 15 business days of approval.

collision.description: Covers your vehicle for damage resulting from a collision. Includes Allstate Safe Driving Bonus (deductible reduced by $100 for each claim-free year, up to $500).

comprehensive.description: Covers damage from theft, weather, fire, animals, vandalism, and falling objects.

rental_reimbursement.description: Up to $30/day for 30 days during covered repairs.

exclusions: Intentional damage.
Business or commercial vehicle use.
Mechanical and electrical breakdown.
Custom parts over $2,500.
claim_conditions: Report within 60 days.
Photos of damage required.
Police report for accidents with injuries.
Vehicle inspection required.
standard.payment_terms: Payment within 10 business days of approval.

collision.description: Covers your vehicle for damage resulting from a collision. Includes accident forgiveness and new car replacement for vehicles under 2 years old.
collision.limit: New car replacement (under 2 years); ACV for older vehicles.

comprehensive.description: Covers damage from theft, weather, fire, animals, vandalism, and falling objects.
comprehensive.limit: New car replacement (under 2 years); ACV for older vehicles.

rental_reimbursement.description: Up to $50/day for 45 days during covered repairs.

exclusions: Intentional damage.
Mechanical and electrical breakdown.
claim_conditions: Report within 90 days.
Photos recommended.
Concierge claims handling with personal representative.
Mobile inspection available at your location.
premium.depreciation_method: New car replacement (under 2 years, under 24,000 miles); ACV otherwise.

collision.description: Standard collision coverage. Specific terms depend on your policy documents.

comprehensive.description: Standard comprehensive coverage. Specific terms depend on your policy documents.

rental_reimbursement.description: Check your policy for rental reimbursement terms.

glass_coverage.description: Check your policy for glass coverage terms.

exclusions: Refer to your specific policy documents for exclusion details.
claim_conditions: Report the incident to your insurance company as soon as possible.
Provide photographic evidence of damage.
Obtain a police report if required by your policy.
Make the vehicle available for inspection.
